title: python-setuptools bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[53.0.0-15]
- Security fix for CVE-2025-47273
Resolves: RHEL-96808

[53.0.0-14]
- Make sure the INSTALLER is not pip and remove RECORD
- Resolves: RHEL-82609
full_text:
[53.0.0-15]
- Security fix for CVE-2025-47273
Resolves: RHEL-96808

[53.0.0-14]
- Make sure the INSTALLER is not pip and remove RECORD
- Resolves: RHEL-82609
